meta.name: Call Point Stopper
meta.heroDescription:
UV-stabilised polycarbonate cover designed to protect electrical switches and manual call points without restricting legitimate operation.
Available in six colours with multiple label and mounting options.
Suitable for public buildings, schools, hospitals, hotels and commercial environments where accidental activation is a concern.

options.FIRE: # IN CASE OF FIRE LIFT COVER - BREAK GLASS
options.EMERGENCY_DOOR: # IN CASE OF EMERGENCY - LIFT COVER BREAK GLASS TO OPEN DOOR
options.EMERGENCY_OPERATE: # IN CASE OF EMERGENCY LIFT COVER - OPERATE DEVICE
